children.heading: Act of international terrorism
children.label: 1 Act of international terrorism
children.text: The term “act of international terrorism” has the meaning given that term in section 14 of the Iran Sanctions Act of 1996 (; note).Public Law 104–17250 U.S.C. 1701

children.heading: Appropriate congressional committees
children.label: 2 Appropriate congressional committees
children.text: The term “appropriate congressional committees” has the meaning given that term in section 14 of the Iran Sanctions Act of 1996 (; note).Public Law 104–17250 U.S.C. 1701

children.heading: Foreign person
children.label: 3 Foreign person
children.text: The term “foreign person” means a person that is not a United States person.

children.label: A
children.text: an individual who is a citizen or national of Iran; or

children.label: B
children.text: an entity organized under the laws of Iran or otherwise subject to the jurisdiction of the Government of Iran.

children.heading: IRGC
children.label: 5 IRGC
children.text: The term “IRGC” means Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps.

children.heading: Knowingly
children.label: 6 Knowingly
children.text: The term “knowingly” has the meaning given that term in section 14 of the Iran Sanctions Act of 1996 (; note).Public Law 104–17250 U.S.C. 1701

children.label: A
children.text: a United States citizen or an alien lawfully admitted for permanent residence to the United States; or

children.label: B
children.text: an entity organized under the laws of the United States or of any jurisdiction within the United States, including a foreign branch of such an entity.
